```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Gun violence has become the leading cause of death for kids in the United States.",
    "The tax is estimated to raise over $160 million annually.",
    "The California Violence Intervention and Prevention Grant Program will receive funding from the new tax.",
    "School mental health services and safety measures will be funded by the new tax.",
    "Firearm investigation and clearance rate initiatives will be supported by the tax proceeds.",
    "Firearm relinquishment programs for domestic abusers and other prohibited persons will be funded.",

    "Gun manufacturers have recorded record-breaking profits in recent years.",

  ]
}
```
